implementation: [Documentation]    Click the Person/Profile button from the Home page guest state.
Click When Ready    ${PERSON_PROFILE_BUTTON}
[Documentation]    Click the Back button from the Home page shell.
Click When Ready    ${BACK_BUTTON}
[Documentation]    Click the Notification button from the Home page shell.
Click When Ready    ${NOTIFICATION_BUTTON}
[Documentation]    Click the Home button from the Home page shell.
Click When Ready    ${HOME_BUTTON}
[Documentation]    Click the Customer signup button from the Home page.
Click When Ready    ${CUSTOMER_SIGNUP_BUTTON}
[Documentation]    Click the Clean survey button from the Home page.
Click When Ready    ${CLEAN_SURVEY_BUTTON}
[Documentation]    Click the Site survey button from the Home page.
Click When Ready    ${SITE_SURVEY_BUTTON}
[Documentation]    Open the Home page using the configured Home page URL.
Open Browser To Url    ${HOME_PAGE_URL}

keywords.keywordName: Verify Home Page Guest Controls Are Visible
implementation: [Documentation]    Verify all approved guest-state Home page controls are visible and enabled.
Wait For Element To Be Ready    ${AUTO_PERSON_BTN_BUTTON}
Wait For Element To Be Ready    ${AUTO_BACK_BTN_BUTTON}
Wait For Element To Be Ready    ${AUTO_NOTIFICATION_BTN_BUTTON}
Wait For Element To Be Ready    ${AUTO_HOME_BTN_BUTTON}
Wait For Element To Be Ready    ${AUTO_BTN_CUSTOMER_SIGNUP_BUTTON}
Wait For Element To Be Ready    ${AUTO_BTN_CLEAN_SURVEY_BUTTON}
Wait For Element To Be Ready    ${AUTO_BTN_SITE_SURVEY_BUTTON}

keywords.keywordName: Verify Browser Url Contains Home Path
implementation: [Documentation]    Verify the current browser URL contains the Home page path.
Location Should Contain    ${HOME_PAGE_PATH}
[Documentation]    Verify navigation to the customer-search workflow.
Location Should Contain    ${CUSTOMER_SEARCH_PAGE_IDENTIFIER}
[Documentation]    Verify navigation to the vehicle-survey workflow.
Location Should Contain    ${VEHICLE_SURVEY_PAGE_IDENTIFIER}
[Documentation]    Verify navigation to the survey workflow.
Location Should Contain    ${SURVEY_PAGE_IDENTIFIER}
[Documentation]    Verify the Login page or Login view is opened from the Home page.
Location Should Contain    ${LOGIN_PAGE_IDENTIFIER}
